ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "unit" INTEGER /* ID of the police unit involved in the incident */,
  "ctzn_age" INTEGER /* Age of the citizen reporting the incident */,
  "ctzn_race" TEXT /* Race of the citizen reporting the incident */,
  "ctzn_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the citizen reporting the incident */,
  "allegation" TEXT /* Type of allegation made against the officer */,
  "finding" TEXT /* Finding resulting from the investigation of the allegation */,
  "ofcr_race" TEXT /* Race of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "ofcr_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the officer involved in the incident */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the incident */,
  "incident_time" TEXT /* Time of the incident */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Location of the incident */,
  "complaint_status" TEXT /* Current status of the complaint */,
  "complaint_received_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was received */,
  "complainant_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the complainant */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the complaint */,
  "incident_report_number" TEXT /* Unique report number for the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_finding FOREIGN KEY ("finding") REFERENCES findings ("finding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_allegation FOREIGN KEY ("allegation") REFERENCES allegations ("allegation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ofcr_race FOREIGN KEY ("ofcr_race") REFERENCES officers ("race"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_unit FOREIGN KEY ("unit") REFERENCES police_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_ctzn_age FOREIGN KEY ("ctzn_age") REFERENCES citizens ("age")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the police unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit's responsibilities */,
  "unit_contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the police unit */,
  "unit_commander" TEXT /* Name of the unit's commander */,
  "unit_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citizens" (
  "citizen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citizen */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the citizen */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the citizen */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the citizen */,
  "complainant_name" TEXT /* Name of the complainant */,
  "complainant_address" TEXT /* Address of the complainant */,
  "complainant_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the complainant */,
  "complainant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the complainant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citizen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "allegations" (
  "allegation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each allegation type */,
  "allegation_type" TEXT /* Description of the allegation type */,
  "allegation_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the allegation */,
  "allegation_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the allegation (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allegation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "findings" (
  "finding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each finding */,
  "finding_type" TEXT /* Description of the finding */,
  "finding_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the finding */,
  "finding_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the finding (e.g., No Impact, Minor Impact, Major Impact) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("finding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the officer */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "officer_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "officer_badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "officer_unit" TEXT /* Unit the officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_followups" (
  "followup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow-up action */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being followed up */,
  "followup_action" TEXT /* Description of the follow-up action taken */,
  "followup_date" TEXT /* Date when the follow-up was made */,
  "followup_status" TEXT /* Status of the follow-up action (e.g., Pending, Completed) */,
  "followup_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments related to the follow-up action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("followup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_followups_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user in the system */,
  "user_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report content */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Monthly, Annual) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the generated report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
